name: Golden Oaks Golf Club
about: Golden Oaks Golf Club is an award-winning, high-end semi-private golf club open to the public. It offers golfers a 'Country Club Experience' without the typical country club prices. The facility features a full-service golf course with five sets of tees, a driving range, a pro shop, a bed and breakfast for stay-and-play packages, and multiple indoor golf simulator bays. The club caters to a wide range of skill levels and is a venue for corporate functions, golf tournaments, and league play.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers a premium 'country club experience' at an accessible public price point
Features indoor golf simulators for year-round play and skill improvement
Provides a comprehensive facility with a full bar, restaurant, and pro shop
Hosts tournaments and events, including the PIAA Eastern PA Championship

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service available at Bogeys Pub, offering a range of dining options from burgers to four-course meals.
A full bar service is available at Bogeys Pub.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs to use with the golf simulators. The pro shop also offers equipment for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed. Bogeys Pub offers a full menu and bar service on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation can typically take 2-4 hours, depending on the simulator software and number of players sharing the bay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golden Oaks is suitable for families, with golf offerings for all skill levels and a casual dining atmosphere at Bogeys Pub.
